# .github/

GitHub-specific configuration for this presentation scaffold.

## Included files

| Path | Purpose |
| --- | --- |
| `copilot-instructions.md` | Repository-wide Copilot guidance |
| `agents/` | Copilot-format mirrors of the canonical Claude agents |

Keep these files semantically aligned with `.claude/`.
The planning workflow starts with `agents/deck-planner.agent.md`, then hands off to `orchestrator.agent.md`.
